title: Tin Man's Fun Bag
description: Adds mobility, terrain generation, mob, industrial/machinery, and various other mods from Tin Man's bag of fun.
body:
## New stuff from Tin Man's bag of fun.

**MAC USERS: You must disable _Distant Horizons_ for this modpack to launch.**

A 1.20.1 pack blending exploration, tech progression, building, world-gen, and QoL—all respecting the core of the game (for the most part).

## ✨ Features

<details>
<summary>World Generation & Exploration</summary>

**Overhauled biomes (Terralith, Biomes O’ Plenty)**

**YUNG’s: Better Dungeons, Strongholds, Mineshafts, Ocean Monuments, Witch Huts, Temples**  

**Structory, Dungeons & Taverns naturally generated structures**

**New mobs & wildlife (Alex’s Mobs, Naturalist, Mythic Mounts, Aquamirae)**

**New villages & towns (Tidal Towns)**

</details>




<details>
<summary>Technology & Automation</summary>
  
**Create + addons (Slice & Dice, Steam ‘n’ Rails, Crafts & Additions, Structures)**

**Mekanism + Tools + Generators**

**Electrodynamics & Voltaic for advanced tech tiers**

**Immersive Aircraft for some basic air-flight options**


</details>








<details>
<summary>Building & Decoration</summary>
  
**Chipped, Create Deco, Supplementaries**

**Immersive lanterns, better leaves, connected textures**

**Visual Workbench, Pantographs & Wires**


</details>






<details>
<summary>Adventure & Dimensions</summary>
  
**The Aether (modernized for 1.20.1)**

**Incendium & Aquamirae content expansions**

Maybe more soon.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Quality of Life</summary>
  
**Traveler’s Backpack, Easy Villagers, Tom’s Simple Storage**

**Jade, JEI, Nature’s Compass, Shulker Tooltip**

**Carry On + extensions, Corpse, Client Sort**
</details>

<details>
<summary>Performance & Visuals</summary>
  
**ModernFix, Embeddium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast**

**Distant Horizons (LOD terrain)**

**Oculus + Complementary Shaders**

**Fresh Animations, Entity Culling, Sound Physics**
</details>

<details>
<summary>And more...</summary>
  
Some random stuff like Orbital Railgun, Goblin Traders, TaCZ, and more!
</details>
